_comment: Standard MMD A-pose finger directions (first segment of each finger: root -> next). Used as fallback when align_fingers_to_reference cannot find a target armature in the scene. Directions are in armature-local space (Blender right-handed Z-up), unit length. Requires arms already aligned to canonical A-pose (run align_arms_to_reference first).
source: measured from Purifier Inase 18 None.pmx rest pose
